benchmark.name: Radiation Oncology NLP Database Medical Physics 100-question QA set
benchmark.boundary: All results use a public answer-keyed benchmark. They are not hidden-test, expert, or clinical-validation results.

methods.name: OpenDataLoader + Codex agent using local skill evidence
methods.answer_host: Codex agent, instructed to call the local skill before selecting

interpretation.parser_ablation: Only the first two methods hold the answer-selection mechanism fixed and therefore isolate the parser/index change.
interpretation.agent_result: The Codex-agent result changes both the parser/runtime and the answer host. It demonstrates agent use of skill evidence, not a parser-only effect.
interpretation.host_transport: The Codex CLI MCP runner was implemented but its non-interactive Windows MCP call was cancelled by host authorization; this live result used direct local skill calls by the Codex agent.
